title: InferenceLog
description: Telemetry payload emitted by the SDK for a single LLM inference call.

log_id.description: UUIDv4. Primary key in inference_logs; idempotency token on retry.

session_id.description: UUIDv4. Joins the call back to its conversation thread.

message_id.description: Optional FK to messages.id when the call produced a stored assistant message.

provider.description: Standardized provider identifier. 'openrouter' indicates the OpenRouter aggregator; the underlying upstream model lives in `model` (e.g. 'anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet').

ttft_ms.description: Time to first token, milliseconds. Streaming-only; null for sync calls.

total_cost.description: Computed cost in USD. May be estimated; check metadata.cost_estimated.

error_stack.description: Serialized exception trace; populated only when request_status='ERROR'.

input_preview.description: Truncated, post-redaction snippet of the user prompt.

output_preview.description: Truncated, post-redaction snippet of the model response.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 instant the request was initiated.

metadata.description: Provider-specific fields and SDK flags (system_fingerprint, finish_reason, cost_estimated, etc.).
